system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_capnhattonkho_theoreq","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[sp_CapNhatTonKho_TheoReq] (@MAYEUCAU NVARCHAR (MAX),
                                      @MAKHO NVARCHAR (50),
									  @BOPHANYC NVARCHAR (50),
                                      @MAVT NVARCHAR (MAX)
)
AS
   BEGIN
      DECLARE @SL_XUAT   DECIMAL (18, 3);

      SELECT @SL_XUAT   = A.soluong_danhan
      FROM tr_material_require_info A
      WHERE mayeucau = @MAYEUCAU AND mact = @MAVT AND bophan = @BOPHANYC;

      IF EXISTS
            (SELECT *
               FROM tr_tonkho
              WHERE tr_tonkho.ngaythang = CONVERT (nvarchar (12), GETDATE (), 112)
                    AND tr_tonkho.mavt = @MAVT
                    AND tr_tonkho.makho = @MAKHO)
         BEGIN
            UPDATE tr_tonkho
               SET tr_tonkho.slxuat    = tr_tonkho.slxuat + @SL_XUAT
             WHERE tr_tonkho.makho = @MAKHO AND tr_tonkho.mavt = @MAVT
                   AND tr_tonkho.ngaythang = CONVERT (nvarchar (12), GETDATE (), 112);

            UPDATE tr_tonkho
               SET tr_tonkho.slcuoi   = (tr_tonkho.sldau + tr_tonkho.slnhap) - tr_tonkho.slxuat
             WHERE tr_tonkho.makho = @MAKHO AND tr_tonkho.mavt = @MAVT
                   AND tr_tonkho.ngaythang = CONVERT (nvarchar (12), GETDATE (), 112);
         END
      --ELSE
         --BEGIN
         --   INSERT INTO tr_tonkho
         --         (
         --             ngaythang,
         --             mavt,
         --             makho,
         --             sldau,
         --             slnhap,
         --             slxuat
         --         )
         --   VALUES (
         --             CONVERT (nvarchar (12), GETDATE (), 112),
         --             @MAVT,
         --             @MAKHO,
         --             0,
         --             0,
         --             @SL_XUAT
         --          )
         --END
      IF EXISTS
            (SELECT *
               FROM tr_tonkho_sum
              WHERE tr_tonkho_sum.mavt = @MAVT
                    AND tr_tonkho_sum.makho = @MAKHO)
         BEGIN
            UPDATE tr_tonkho_sum
               SET tr_tonkho_sum.soluong    = tr_tonkho_sum.soluong - @SL_XUAT
             WHERE tr_tonkho_sum.mavt = @MAVT
                   AND tr_tonkho_sum.makho = @MAKHO
         END
      --ELSE
      --   BEGIN
      --      INSERT INTO tr_tonkho_sum(mavt, makho, soluong)
      --      VALUES (@MAVT, @MAKHO, 0 - @SL_XUAT)
      --   END
   END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_material_require_info","dbo.tr_tonkho","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_tonkho","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"flags":["writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
